data.body: Rebased 5-commit stack onto current origin/main (was 41 behind; main refactored outbound differ into _compute_outbound_update_mutation + removed dead _call_with_backoff). Resolved conflicts in acli_subprocess.py + outbound_differ.py; threaded conflict_sink/dropped_field_sink through _compute_outbound_update_mutation; added repo_root unpack in _run_differs_outbound. 234 affected tests green. Re-pushed: changes 389/390/407/408/409 now rebased patchsets on main. Continuing C2 c244.
